title: APIv2: "filters" don't seem to apply in "containers/json"
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**
I try to list only one specific container by using "filters" and specifying "id".
Command I use:
```
sudo curl --unix-socket /run/podman/podman.sock "http://d/v1.12/libpod/containers/json?filters=%7B%22id%22%3A%5B%228ad12bdc9e6c8afdc6971f660607a5dd634fb707502a5bffe93d930fa8e6dbc9%22%5D%7D"
```
This return 8 containers (because I have currently 8 running) and not only the one with the given id.

It encodes: ```/v1.12/libpod/containers/json?filters={"id":["8ad12bdc9e6c8afdc6971f660607a5dd634fb707502a5bffe93d930fa8e6dbc9"]}``` which is the format that documentation states.

I use current fedora 31 build `podman-1.9.0-1`.

comments.body:
value of id is a string from documentation :
id=<ID> a container's ID

It's OK for me :
```
curl -X GET -H "Content-Type: application/json" http://192.168.200.13:2375/v1.24/libpod/containers/json?filters={"id":"f3ce92a4a9f29e92cc62b7288554a5aedda4f0f833d761589b791cbd62961078"}
[{"Id":"46cde0665ed9ea3632c1df5b9bd76b0e89986fc42428249739672fe4d4012cb1","Names":["/jenkins-lts"],"Image":"docker.io/jenkins/jenkins:lts-alpine","ImageID":"74271f0266b4b72398edf58465a6fb80ab743e0d9d45946b5aaebfff1215fe8a","Command":"","Created":1586808842,"Ports":null,"Labels":{},"State":"running","Status":"","NetworkSettings":null,"Mounts":null,"Name":"","Config":null,"NetworkingConfig":null,"AdjustCPUShares":false}]
```

> A JSON encoded value of the filters (a map[string][]string) to process on the containers list. Available filters:

from [doc](https://podman.readthedocs.io/en/latest/_static/api.html#operation/libpodListContainers). Doesn't that `[]string` mean it is an array?

> It's OK for me :

Do you have more than one container running?

```
$ sudo podman ps
CONTAINER ID  IMAGE                            COMMAND  CREATED             STATUS                 PORTS  NAMES
2b6f6276da71  docker.io/library/fedora:latest  bash     About a minute ago  Up About a minute ago         flamboyant_chatterjee
6a6221651ef5  docker.io/library/fedora:latest  bash     About a minute ago  Up About a minute ago         clever_gates

$ sudo curl -X GET -H "Content-Type: application/json" --unix-socket /run/podman/podman.sock http://h/v1.24/libpod/containers/json?filters={"id":"2b6f6276da71301e2311cc6a0671d78faa5548424e56a1447a709364dae8d76b"} | jq | grep Id
    "Id": "2b6f6276da71301e2311cc6a0671d78faa5548424e56a1447a709364dae8d76b",
    "Id": "6a6221651ef56da521a53604752c057a19f38ba46fc3b7d32e73ce5df7f34564",
```
